steps.title: Find the sphere radius
steps.content:
The radius is half the diameter:
$$r=31.000/2=15.500$$

steps.title: Compute the volume
steps.content:
Use the sphere volume formula with $\pi=3.14159$:
$$V=\frac{4}{3}(3.14159)(15.500)^3$$
The volume is about $15{,}598.517$.

steps.title: Multiply by density
steps.content:
Mass is density times volume:
$$2.4000(15{,}598.517)=37{,}436.441$$
Rounded to the nearest whole number. The answer is 37436.
